stemHtml:
While planning a flight, the pilot observes the following route designator on the chart: UM120-RNP. According to ICAO Annex 11, the following elements of this route designator are considered integral parts:

1. "U" indicates that the route is an upper air route
2. "M" indicates that the route is a regional area navigation route
3. "120" forms part of the basic designator used to identify the route
4. "RNP" indicates a prescribed navigation specification
